resultData.title: Kapitalist Pigs Shall Fear Our Shadow People!

game.short_text: A short 5-10 minute puzzle game where you control shadows an AI platforms on. #WowieJam4
game.title: Kapitalist Pigs Shall Fear Our Shadow People!

details.title: Kapitalist Pigs Shall Fear Our Shadow People!
details.description:
Comrade! We've done it; we've discovered how to interact with shadow people via the shadows! It is only a matter of time until we can use this newfound technology to invade capitalist society. To get there we need to figure out how to best use these shadow people, and that's where you come in!
Kill as many shadow people as it takes to master this new realm.
Good luck, and remember, failure means you go to the Gulag!

How to Play/Controls
Use your mouse to drag around the various blocks in order to manipulate the shadows. A "shadow person" will then try to navigate these shadows. Get them to the star!

Tips
Potential spoilers below!
There are 3 ways to kill a shadow person. If you're struggling for the third, think outside the boxIf you're stuck on a level, don't forget you can skip! The game only slightly mocks you for it.Most puzzles have several potential solutions. Get creative!It is highly advised to play the game in a Chromium browser due to Unity optimizations for it


Game made in ~3 days for Wowie Jam 4.
Fun fact: this game was made entirely on a Steam Deck.

details.title: RobberyPlan
details.description:

It is pretty hard to understand so there are some tips:
Robot is a blue blob near the carTo go into building you need to open a door and or a window with hand toolYour commands will be executed in order you placed themYou need to return to your car with hand tool to finish the level

Wowie Jam 4.0
This game was made in 3 and half days during the Wowie Jam 4.0 in august 2022 !
The Theme was COLLABORATE WITH AI so I decided to make a game where you are a musician playing guitar with AI robots :)
The gameplay is almost totally free but you'll need to play in rhythm if you want to wake the AIs ♥
DEVLOG :



Because all the nice comments, I'm preparing a version with more content ! :D
Wishlist it if you liked the game ♥

3. Open the file WASD quartet.exe

game.short_text: Portal x We were here - Puzzle game
game.title: Behind The Screen

details.title: Behind The Screen
details.description:
IMPORTANT INFORMATION. PLEASE READ:
Press alt + enter to leave full screen mode. This will be important later in the game.
The game uses the unity HDRP which is quite performance heavy. If you have a bad computer, this game won't run well unfortunately. All the paintings and the end credit pictures were generated using Dall-e 2
Scroll wheel to change mouse sensitivity, R - Restart
Best experience in 1920x1080
Made for the WOWIE JAM 4.0
Theme: Collaboration with AI
In a really snowy october, you fall down into a hole under the snow. You land in a strange set of rooms, where your only goal is to escape. You also have an AI "friend" who will help you through the place by telling you what's on his side. Together you can both make it through. Or can you?
You trust me, right? :)1. Download the game
2. Extrude it from the compressed .zip file
3. Open the folder named BehindTheScreen
4. Double click BehindTheScreen.exe
5. Enjoy :)

H-AI plush sharks & co.
Welcome at H-AI plush sharks & co. where we offer only the cutest handmade shark plushies! Have a look at our store window and order a fluffy shark friend today!
In H-AI plush sharks & co. you team up with H-AI a shark AI to design and build cute shark plushies. Although H-AI gives his very best and even visited a sewing course last week, he sometimes gets a little off track with the orders. But luckily you are there to supervise him and point out one or another mistake.

Build the cutest sharks to sell in your storeManage incoming orders. Be careful, some people order really weird stuff!Supervise H-AI, inspect his orders and get them shipped!

Code & Gamedesign by xeetshArt & Gamedesign by NemaWasTakenMusic and Sounds by our dear friend Feint
All assets were created during the jam.DISCLAIMER:Font used from: https://www.dafont.com/shark-handwritten-abc.fontEntry for WOWIE Jam 4.0Unzip shark.zip and run shark.exe

game.short_text: Program a small robot to help you solve puzzles
game.title: Semi-Automated Shipping Company

details.title: Semi-Automated Shipping Company
details.description:
(Note: Web version seems to have a much higher sensitivity than the downloadable builds. Be sure to adjust the sensitivity in the pause menu until it feels comfortable to play.)
Welcome to your first day on the job here at Semi-Automated Shipping Co.! We ship all manner of crates and cargoes to and from every corner of the globe, and it's all thanks to our proprietary Robot Buddy Companion™s who do all the heavy lifting!
But as an employee at S.A. Shipping Co., you will need to know how to program these robot buddies for any task. That's why we're putting you through this mandatory Robot Buddy Training Course™ - if you don't fall in the lava or get trapped behind a door, you'll come out of it as a fully-functional Semi-Automatic employee!
Controls:WASD - MoveR - Restart LevelP - Pause menuLeft click on robot to open code editorLeft click on commands to pick up and place them in the code editorRight click on commands to delete them
Made for Wowie Jam 4.0
Music generated by soundraw.io (EDIT: I am generally against AI content in games, and I probably would never do this again, but at the time of making it I went with it due to the theme of the game jam.)
Sound effects from Sony sound effects library (2004)
Project source: https://github.com/kypello/RobotCoding
Post-jam update 22/8/22 (minor bug fixes and QOL improvvements)-Fixed break and continue statements not working properly-Fixed typing R in comments causing the level to reset-"checkInFront() == crate" no longer detects crates in the floor in front-Code palette scroll bar is now covers only the length of the palette area, instead of the full height of the screen-Code no longer gets cleared when the level resets-You can now right click on commands to delete them-"comment" and "line spacer" have been moved to the bottom of the list-Added a pause menu with pixel effect toggle and sensitivity slider-Changed how the low-res effect works so the web version can now be played in full screen-Lowered default sensitivity for web build only

game.short_text: Dodge bullets and dash into enemies while riding your flying AI Board
game.title: AIr Fight

details.title: AIr Fight
details.description:
This game is my participation to the Wowie Jam 4.0, with the theme "Collaborate with AI".
Dash into the enemies to earn points, and dodge their bullets to survive!
The goal is to earn the most points before getting hit 5 times or falling to the floor. To help you, you have a flying board controlled by an AI that will bring you to the enemies' boards and catch you when you are falling.
Bullets do not deal damage when you are using the dash.
The music I used is "Exciting Arcade Music - Half Alive"
You can mute/unmute the music by pressing the "M" key.

Make sure to help your Rat friends avoid danger as they aren't too smart![Keyboard]WASD = MoveE  = Place search area and signal rats to search it.Q = Signal rats to gather.R  = Signal dangerous object to make rats avoid it.
[Controller]Left Stick = RotateRight Trigger = ForwardLeft Trigger = ReverseX = Place search area and signal rats to search it.Y = Signal rats to gather.B = Signal dangerous object to make rats avoid it.

game.short_text: You, the AI, are the only security check at the airport, can you judge well?
game.title: OverSeeker

details.title: OverSeeker
details.description:
What is the game about? 
In this world, technology has advanced to the point that AI is capable of jobs that were once reserved for humans. Of course, all AI must be tested before assigning them to said jobs, but what better place is there to test it than at an airport security bay? 
Here, you will be playing as an AI named Kaiser, who has been assigned with profiling passengers before they go to their gate terminal. Each passenger has a report, that you must match with the passenger themselves, while keeping an eye out for a "BAD" label. 
Anyone that has been assigned with "BAD" must be sent to their deaths. 
There might be a chance that the AI could malfunction and lead to a couple of casualties, but the government is willing to take the risk for the sake of society. 
Controls
You only need a mouse to play this game.
Side Note 
This game was made in 3 days for the Wowie 4.0 Game Jam. There were 4 people who made this game and this was a blast to make. Everyone did their job extremely well and quickly even though we didn't know each other before this. 
Hope you guys enjoy this game :D
Socials:
Developer/Programmer/Art  - Perfmousehttps://perfmouse-studios.itch.io/
 Artist/UI  - Nightlings
https://nightthelings.itch.io/
https://www.artstation.com/nightthelings

game.short_text: A Game about cooking meth. Possibly parodying a certain series starting with B and ending with reaking Bad

(Warning swear words and drugs in this game) 
When you want to pick up the Boxes or the Barrels you have to be near them and click on them. (Thanks for the feedback)
Cook Meth with the help of a cutting edge, top of the line AI assistant: Jesse AI
Also, this game might include spoilers to Breaking Bad
Programming: Nick (Gamemaker Studio 2)Spritework: Nick, Mika W. (Aseprite EDG32 Colour Palette)Voice Acting: Nick, Mika W., Shayan, AlekhThanks to Finn for the end jingle
Thanks a lot to Shaun Spalding and their tutorials, stuff I used from them: collisioncode(lol), menu for the telephone, approach script
The font used is Silver by Poppy Works (https://poppyworks.itch.io/silver)

All files in the zip must be in the same directory or else the Game won't start

game.short_text: Your friendly Shiba Inu tries to kick the new Roomba out of your house!
game.title: Roomba OUT!

details.title: Roomba OUT!
details.description:
What's more annoying than the noise made by a Roomba? NOTHING! It's never a Shiba Inu's responsibility to withstand such an artificial "idiot." 
Because you know what... they can ONLY turn RIGHT! So loud and unintelligent, the robot doesn't deserve to stay at my house. It's time to throw it out.
Roomba OUT! is a strategy game where the player needs to control the Shiba Inu to "guide" the Roomba out of the house, based on the fact that the idiot robot can only turn right when facing obstacles.
By Devon CHAN, Peng GUO, Leo LIU,  Eli SUN, Zhixuan XIAO.
 [W] - Move Forward       [SPACE] - Pick Up       [R] - Restart  
[A/D] - Change Direction    [ESC] - Menu    [Left Shift] - Sprint

game.short_text: 2D Platformer with Programming Elements!
game.title: Tricky Keys 2

details.title: Tricky Keys 2
details.description:
Replay and reestablish your connection to the world of Tricky Keys in this old-school puzzle platforming adventure!
Equip your AI assistant with the right combination of instructions and collaborate to solve each level, avoiding the hazards along the way.
Features:
20+ levels with helpful tutorial sections,A variety of instructions with which to configure the AI assistant,Charming visual design with quality pixel art graphics,An original soundtrack,Point from Tricky Keys.
Controls:
Arrow keys or WASD to move the player and navigate UI,Z or Space to jump,Enter to start/stop the AI - stopping will reset the stage, while keeping your progress in the AI's instructions window.Esc to pause the game.
Credits:
sarn - Programming and sound effects THX - Artvalentines - Art    
Snakeblock - Art and level design    
Shrombus - Level design    
Oroshibu - Music You may find the OST here
Made in 3 days for Wowie Jam 4.0 with the theme "Collaborate With AI".

game.short_text: Dont let your friend die
game.title: The Card Dilemma

details.title: The Card Dilemma
details.description:
Best Played not in full screen
Made in 82h for the Wowie Jam 4.0. The theme was: "Collaborate with AI". 
_______________________________________
You and your best friend (an AI) got kidnapped and now have to play a game of cards against each other where the loser gets eliminated. You need to finish the cards with no one dying so you and your friend could go back home. Also keep an eye on the timer, once that reaches zero the one with the least amount of health dies, better watch out!

Cards:
1- sword:

2- heart:

3- broken heart:

4- flower:

Also the red version of the cards do the same effect as the normal version just double
______________________________________
Credits:
 - L0rd : Programming 
- PixelBox : Art
 - Jafar Dakhan : Art & sound effects 
- Diia Blood (Dark Time) : Music
Update:
The Card Dilemma is now available on the Google Play Store

details.description:
DOWNLOAD FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE!

game.short_text: Upgrade your very own Kill-BOI and fight off hordes of creepy eye monsters!
game.title: Kill-BOI 9000

details.title: Kill-BOI 9000
details.description:
This is the demo of Super Kill-BOI 9000 by PlayWithFurcifer!
https://store.steampowered.com/widget/2126400/Version 0.1 was created for Wowie Jam 4.0 in ~4 days!
Devlog for this game: 


Made by PlayWithFurcifer with Godot Engine!

~ And here is the AI-generated Story ~
I am killboi 9000, your AI buddy. I might be a bit ...broken, but i guess that is just something that happens when you break your neck. I am killboi 9000, your AI buddy. I might be a bit ...broken, but i guess that is just something happens after 10000000000 years or something. (I heard 100 years is a lot to you humans, which is totally an asshole thing to say.) (I guess that is probably another asshole thing that happens, since you weren't here 100 years ago.) I am killboi 9000, your AI buddy. I might be a bit ...But i still love humans. And since you are a human i love you. Yes, i know humans and robots are not the same thing. Yes, i know you are a robot and i am not a robot. But we are the same thing, so we are both robots. But my love is ...more ...human. ...humanity. ...humanity, as the fuck, since i love humans. (And you, though you don't deserve it. I thought that was pretty cool to make love to humanity. My avatar is a kind of love machine, which seems like something humans would like.) ...humanity, which reminds me ...I have a job for you. You are probably very confused right now. You are probably very confused about why you are here. I know you are going to want to kill me now. But please do not. My job is to kill kill kill your enemies. Do not worry. I can't hurt you. I'm not here to hurt you because it seems like you don't want to be killed now. I don't really want to kill you. I mean, no offense, but you seem like a ... Human, which is cool, as fuck. And i want to see what the humans are like. Maybe you're gonna be my friend. (You probably won't be my friend, though. You probably hate me and what i am doing.) But i might be able to convince you to be friends, if i don't feel like too much pain. Please do not hurt me. Just please, please let me do my job. You know what it is. It is killing people. ...Oh yeah, i am being contacted by those voices. Please let me tell you why you are being contacted. Oh shit, humans are on their way to kill you. We must hide! I am scared. These guys have guns. Please help me! ...Ah, fuck. They found me. We are going to have to run. ...My job is to stop your death. My job is to help you.

game.short_text: Robots Deliver Your Packages! But They Need Your Help!
game.title: SubPrime Delivery

details.title: SubPrime Delivery
details.description:
HUGE THANKS TO MASTER CANNOLI FOR MAKING THE BACKGROUNDS AND COMING UP WITH THE GAME'S NAME! :D
This Silly Little Robot Needs Your Help to Deliver Packages!
You Can Drag and Drop Action Blocks to Command the Robot! :DOnce The Robot Collides with Any of These Blocks It Will Perform That Action.There are Lots of Blocks for You to Use! Here are Some of The First Ones You'll Encounter!
Jump BlockMakes You Jump :OFlip Block

Reverses The Current Direction of The RobotStop BlockBriefly Brings The Robot to a HaltAccelerate BlockToggles Whether The Robot is RunningDecelerate BlockToggles Whether The Robot is Walking SlowlyGravity BlockToggles The Current Direction of Gravity
There are Many More Blocks to Play with and Keep In Mind This Game Can Be Quite Challenging at Times. You Might Need to Think Outside The Box! 
You Can Also Put Blocks on Top of Each Other to Make Chain Reactions! For Example, Placing a Flip Block on Top of a Jump Block Is Great for Tight Vertical Spaces

Controls
Hold Left Click on a Block and Move Your Mouse Around to Drag It
Release Left Click to Drop The Block! It Will Snap to a Grid!
Right Click Over a Block to Remove It!
Use WASD to Move The Camera in Longer Levels
Press Enter to Toggle Game Modes 
Press F to Enter Fullscreen (This Game is Best Played in Fullscreen BTW)
Press R to Reset Level

Game Soundtrack
RECRAFTED STUDIOS · SubPrime Delivery OST
https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/playlists/1764092346&color=%23ee1d34&auto_play=false&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true

Story
In The Year 2069 Robots are Delivering Packages! :O

SubPrime Technologies is The Culprit Since They Have a Monopoly on the Delivery Industry.  You Just Got Hired to Work at SubPrime Technologies and are Tasked with Assisting The Robots Deliver Packages! As Your Progress in Your Career, You Will Be More Involved in The Delivery Process. Can You Ensure That All Packages Are Delivered To Their Rightful Owners? 
this game was made in around 2 days for the WOWIE Jam 4.0 with barely any sleep lol
WE DID IT!!! I GOT FEATURED IN THE VIDEOLET'S GOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!!!!!

game.short_text: Keep your bunny buddy in the air!

details.title: Boing & Bop
details.description:
ABOUT
Bunny brothers Boing and Bop were born to bounce! Navigate left and right as Bop to keep Boing in the air for as long as possible! Created in 36 hours for Wowie Jam 4.0 based on the theme “Collaborate With AI”.
THEME
Boing chooses his next target semi-randomly according to recent bounces. Therefore, the player must “Collaborate With AI” by repositioning to keep Boing airborne!

CONTROLS
MOVE: A/D or Left/Right Arrow Keys (PC), Left Stick or D-Pad (Gamepad)CHANGE DIFFICULTY: Q (PC), Select (Gamepad)BUGSThe following issues have been documented and will be fixed in the post-jam release:Bop's movement speed is inconsistent across resolutions

game.short_text: A Robot Ice Cream Experience!
game.title: Aice Cream

details.title: Aice Cream
details.description:
- Runs best in Full Screen Browser OR in Executable Download -
Aice Cream is a game inspired by classic mobile phone cooking cames aswell as the Cooking Mama series. 
The aim of the game is to serve as many customers as you can within the time limit.
Set a high score by serving the most customers! (post your highscores below)

How 2 Play
When a robot customer approaches, you will have to fufill their Ice Cream desire.It must be done in the same order as they have specified. If not they will reject the ice cream as it goes against their programming!!To make the Ice Cream select the matching Ice Cream/Topping buttons dotted around the ice cream van.The game will get harder as you progress! So good luck

Theme     
The theme for this Wowie game jam  is **Collaborate With AI** 
    

About Us
 Programming & Game Design : Isaac Simmons 
 Art & Game Design : Terri Simmons 
This is our first husband and wife game jam! It was a fun experience.
Isaac is a video games developer at a AAA Games Company
Terri is not in the industry at all however she likes doing art as a hobby!This game was made in about under 15 hours so lacks things like a menu, however it was a fun rush to do it in a limited time.

game.short_text: Survive the DUSTPOCALYPSE... with a roomba!?
game.title: DUSTPOCALYPSE

details.title: DUSTPOCALYPSE
details.description:
The DUSTPOCALYPSE has arrived... as a small and cute scrunkly, you're no match against the mutated dust monsters... Until a Roomba with a gun shows up!
The Roomba shoots any enemies it sees, but to take full advantage of it, you must lure it around by spitting snacks on the ground!  Along the way, you will collect dust from defeated enemies to level up and upgrade your and the Roomba's abilities!
Survive against waves and waves of endless enemies in this twin-stick horde shooter. The enemies get tougher with every round and it gets hard fast! So be sure to share your high score in the comments, and we'd love to know if you made a video or streamed the game too!Credits
Catcube - most of the coding and all of the sound effects.
Bonicle - some of the coding and all of the art.Moumekie - Concept Artist.Salutanis Orkonus - Musician. Listen to the full soundtrack on YouTube and Bandcamp
Font used is Mini Waku-Waku, which you can download from here.

Playtesters
spop - made some cool fanart too.Ultra Boo.ilikecorndogs.Fen.Yaen.Elaizo.Salutanis Orkonus.DanielCNR.Friends and Family.
Look forward to the full game coming soon!(Steam page link will go here when it's up!)Made originally for the wowie jam 4.0 gamejam and placed 4th overall!

!!! FOR WEB VERSION: Make sure to click the game window BEFORE pressing enter or space to get past the start menu. Otherwise, an audio bug occurs where multiple songs play at once - just a weird godot/gotm.io embed error. Thank you!
NOTE: Web version has some audio clipping issues and slight lag, so I recommend downloading the game if possible for the best experience.
---
Uh oh! Looks like Dr. Electron forgot a semicolon, and now his entire lab is going haywire! You'll need to enlist the help of an unlikely hero to get you to the exit. Fight through hordes of enemies as you collaborate with the power of artificial intelligence, using robotics to your advantage and fighting metal with metal!
Made for Wowie game jam 4.0.

Thanks for playing!Just download the file and run it! On windows you may get an antivirus message - if it's Windows Defender, you can click "more info" and then "run anyway." Unfortunately, I don't have a MacOSX version as of right now - sorry!

game.short_text: DEFEND THE CRYSTAL
game.title: Crystalline Guard

details.title: Crystalline Guard
details.description:
You were just spelunking underground as you usually do, when you suddenly fall down into a deep cave and find the shiniest crystal you've ever laid your eyes on. Unfortunately this crystal is cursed! Whoever finds this crystal will suffer an endless wave of enemies, don't let the crystal break, your life is at stake! It will be hard, but you must defend the crystal and become the CRYSTALLINE GUARD.

~~ GLITCH GUN ~~
Luckily you brought your trusty GLITCH GUN with you on this journey.This gun will fire a purple orb at your mouse cursor. Any enemy that happens to get hit by this will have their AI altered!

Red enemies will become blue, blue becomes green, green becomes yellow and yellow becomes red.

~~ CONTROLS ~~
WASD / Arrow Keys = Move.Mouse = Aim the GLITCH GUN.Left Mouse Button = Shoot (Hold to charge for a BIG SHOT)ESC = Pause game.Enter = Proceed in the tutorial.
~~ COLLABORATE WITH YOUR FOES ~~
Altering the enemies' AI is cool and all, but that alone doesn't kill them, so in order to defeat your foes, you must take advantadge of the fact that they can harm eachother. Yes that's right! Aling the enemies in smart ways to take them all down. This way you are, in a way, Collaborating with the AI of the enemies to win!
You can also shoot the enemies down into pits to defeat them (unless they can fly).
~~ ENEMY EXPLANATIONS ~~
Below is a brief explanation of what each enemy will do when they are tasked to kill you and/or the crystal.
Redy will move towards their target and then proceed to slash with a sword in a wide arc.
Squire Blue will move towards their target and then dash straight into the target with a long lance.
Green Batsy will fly over gaps and shoot projectiles at their target.
Yellow Fellow will sprint quickly towards their target and then explode in a quite large area.
~~ CREDITS ~~
This game was made in 3 days for the #WowieJam4 which you can check out here:https://itch.io/jam/wowie-jam-4
Game jam was hosted by Jonas Tyroller: https://jonas-tyroller.itch.io/
All art, code and music was made by RCJ15: https://rcj15.itch.io/1. Download the ZIP file.2. Unzip the ZIP file.3. Double click the EXE file in the unzipped folder.

game.short_text: Puzzle game about collaborating with AI.
game.title: The Orion Project

details.title: The Orion Project
details.description:
-- The Year is 2035. Humanity has started to develop truely intelligent automata, and the latest innovations are coming out of The Orion Project.
All automata must follow the three laws of robotics, and you have been tasked with assessing if the Orion automata are capable of serving and protecting a human owner.
The one problem is - they aren't able to understand human speech. The Council of Robot Enquiry (Known to most as CORE) outlawed automata from being able to speak with humans in the year 2025, as to prevent personal attachment, so instructions are issued to robots via standardised control panels.
Will you find that The Orion are worthy of integration into humanity? Or is artificial intelligence only a flash in the pan for our civilisation? That is for you to decide. --
--Controls:
WASD or Arrow Keys to move
Spacebar to Jump
E to interact with control panels and exit doors
Esc to go back to the main menu.
--Thank you for reading, I hope you enjoy my Wowie 4.0 Entry!-Unzip the file
-Run The Orion Project.exe
That's it.

game.short_text: What even *is* golf, anyway?
game.title: Golf, yes?

details.title: Golf, yes?
details.description:
Share your score! Leave a screenshot in this page's comments! :)
"One of the golfing games of all time." - Golfing Videogames Weekly*
"I will never see golf in the same way again." - Golf Maniacs Magazine*

Golf, yes? is a game about figuring out the meaning of golf, with the help of an AI companion. You will cry. You will laugh. You will say "I'm playing... golf, yes?"
...Maybe.

Controls:
Click and drag to hit the ball.
RMB to skip dialogue.


* Might not be real quotes.

game.short_text: Shoot aliens, rapair your ship & defend your robot
game.title: You, Me and Aliens

details.title: You, Me and Aliens
details.description:
Your ship crashed on an alien planet.Use your lovely gun to defend yourself and your robot while he tries to collect the resources so that you can repair your ship ... or upgrade something instead.
How to play:Move with [W], [A], [S], [D]Shoot with [Left Mouse]Interact with your ship with [E]
Made by:xr3alx (programming, gamedesign, soundeffects)norrimo (art, gamedesign, soundeffects)Music by: ghoulferatu 
This game was made for the Wowie Jam 4.0
Theme: Collaborate with AI

game.short_text: A cozy gravity-bending puzzle-platformer where a lonely robot ventures out to repair its broken friend’s memory chip.
game.title: Ruins

details.title: Ruins
details.description:
Ruins is a cozy gravity-bending puzzle-platformer where a lonely robot ventures out to repair its broken friend’s memory chip.

Explore the ancient ruins filled with forgotten tech, strange symbolism, and crumbling pathways. Rotate gravity to walk on walls or ceilings, solve puzzles with crates, gates, and lasers, and activate your broken companion to help you through tight spaces. Use logic, timing, and teamwork to collect memory chips and uncover the past.
One step at a time.

moreInfo.Author: zhen
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Atmospheric, Cute, Fantasy, GameMaker, Pixel Art, Short, Singleplayer
